extractionNotes: extractRenderState: MobRenderer.extractRenderState super, ArmedEntityRenderState.extractArmedEntityRenderState, then isDancing/isSpinning/spinningProgress/holdingAnimationProgress from Allay entity (javap 26.1.2 lines 34–51).
AllayModel.setupAnim is lifted ok: wing idle uses walk fields; arms use holdingAnimationProgress; dance branch uses isDancing, spinningProgress, isSpinning (no KeyframeAnimation.apply).
Preview driver allay_hold_dance_cycle ramps holdingAnimationProgress then toggles dance/spin flags for viewport motion.
